taxonomy: Musa × alphurica is a hybrid banana cultivar, specifically a triploid cultivar. It belongs to the genus Musa, which comprises various edible banana species. Within the genus, Musa × alphurica is classified as a member of section Eumusa, a subgenus of bananas commonly consumed worldwide. This classification helps in distinguishing it from other banana species, such as those in the sections Callimusa and Rhaphiophora. The precise classification of Musa × alphurica contributes to understanding its characteristics and behaviors as a distinct cultivar.
